# App & Monetization Ideas

## Affiliate Links (priority order)

| Partner | Commission | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Wise** | ~$50/qualifying signup | ✅ Added (placeholder) | Replace `href` with your affiliate URL |
| **SafetyWing** | 10% recurring/mo | 🔲 To add | Nomad insurance — rare recurring commission |
| **Skyscanner** | CPC / revenue share | 🔲 To add | Add near Airport card in detail panel |
| **GetYourGuide** | ~8% per booking | 🔲 To add | Pairs with Top Attractions feature |
| **Booking.com** | ~4% per booking | 🔲 To add | Accommodation research |
| **Revolut** | ~$20–40/signup | 🔲 To add | Good Wise alternative |
| **Airalo** | ~$3–6/sale | 🔲 To add | eSIM — very relevant for new arrivals |
| **NordVPN / ExpressVPN** | $30–100/sale | 🔲 To add | High payout, nomads always need VPN |
| **Hostelworld** | ~40% of booking fee | 🔲 To add | Budget traveller segment |
| ~~Airbnb~~ | — | ❌ Skip | Ended public affiliate program in 2023 |
| ~~Coworker.com~~ | — | ❌ Skip | Affiliate program unconfirmed |

---

## Revenue Estimate (10k visits/month)

| Source | Monthly (realistic) |
|---|---|
| Wise | $200–$850 |
| SafetyWing | $50–$150 (grows with signups) |
| Skyscanner | $20–$50 |
| Booking.com | ~$20 |
| **Total** | **~$300–$1,000** |

Google AdSense: not worth it at this scale (~$20/mo). Revisit if a blog/guides section is added.

---

## Traffic Ideas

- **SEO city pages** — `/cities/medellin`, `/cities/mexico-city` etc. Biggest long-term unlock.
  - Target: "best cities for digital nomads LATAM", "cost of living [city] remote worker"
- **Reddit** — r/digitalnomad, r/remotework, r/SouthAmerica, country subs
- **Twitter/X** — Share "perfect weather days" stats as visual screenshots (inherently shareable)
- **LinkedIn** — Remote work / nomad audience is strong there
- **Product Hunt** — Launch when more cities are added
- **Nomad List** — Get listed / mentioned on nomadlist.com

---

## City Profile Features to Add

- What it's known for
- Airbnb average price (→ Booking.com affiliate link)
- Best neighborhoods
- Top restaurants
- Top cafes
- Top bars
- Top attractions (→ GetYourGuide affiliate link)
- Airport: Uber availability, transport links (→ Skyscanner affiliate link)
- Visa / digital nomad visa info
- Cost of living breakdown (rent, food, transport)
- Safety index by neighborhood

## Other App Ideas

- Side-by-side city comparison view
- "Best city for me" quiz (filters → result)
- User ratings / community scores
- CSV/PDF export of comparison (paid feature)
- Pro tier — deeper data behind a Stripe paywall ($5–9/mo)
- B2B embeddable widget for HR / relocation companies
- Relocation consulting lead gen CTA
